race.demon.name: Demon
skill.venom_bite.desc: The first weapon waiting in your jaws. Fangs sink into flesh and pour venom into the blood; while the prey still struggles, the toxin quietly eats it from within. Slow, but unforgiving.
skill.lethal_venom.name: Lethal Venom
skill.sharp_claw.name: Sharp Claw
skill.sharp_claw.desc: A limb honed from chitin to an edge. For those who won't wait on venom: a direct, honest, bloody cut. The oldest instinct — close in and tear.
skill.scythe_limb.name: Scythe Limb
skill.scythe_limb.desc: A scythe-like limb; high piercing damage.
skill.silk_thread.name: Silk Thread
skill.silk_thread.desc: The first silk to leave your body. Thin but stubborn: it slows the prey and breaks its lunge. Your true spider power branches from here — to bind, to cut, to make the field yours.
skill.binding_silk.name: Binding Silk
skill.quick_thought.name: Quick Thought
skill.quick_thought.desc: Your small brain begins to fire unusually fast. You spot danger a beat sooner and find the right combination quicker. The main line that feeds INT — where knowledge turns into power.
skill.accelerated_mind.name: Accelerated Mind
skill.hp_regen.name: HP Regen
skill.hp_regen.desc: At death's edge your body learns something: wounds begin to close on their own. A quiet, constant mending — even mid-fight the flesh slowly stitches itself back.
skill.auto_heal.name: Auto-Heal
skill.appraisal.name: Appraisal
skill.appraisal.desc: The eye that turns looking into a weapon. As it levels it peels back the enemy's type, attack, HP and weakness, layer by layer. The unknowing die twice; the knowing look first, then strike.
skill.insight.name: Insight
skill.insight.desc: Deep appraisal; weak points and resistances.
skill.dread_gaze.name: Dread Gaze
skill.dread_gaze.desc: Eye ability; a slotted dread gaze may make enemies recoil (skip an attack).
skill.larder.name: Larder
skill.larder.desc: Store corpses; more slots as it levels, refrigeration (no decay) at high levels.

skill.fist_strike.name: Fist Strike
skill.fist_strike.desc: The most natural weapon of a simple human limb: a clenched fist. No chitin or venom, but delivered with direct, honest, blunt force.
skill.heavy_punch.name: Heavy Punch
skill.heavy_punch.desc: A bone-shattering strike delivered with proper stance and weight behind it.
skill.shattering_strike.name: Shattering Strike
skill.shattering_strike.desc: The ultimate punch combining raw physical power and momentum to rattle and break the target.
skill.cutting_wire.name: Cutting Wire
skill.cutting_wire.desc: Silk that cuts; deals damage as it binds.
skill.parallel_minds.name: Parallel Minds
skill.parallel_minds.desc: Split your mind in two — one more thought. Each mind fires an EXTRA skill per turn ignoring cooldown, and reads the labyrinth for MP/SP while fighting. (+1 skill slot)
skill.regeneration.name: Regeneration
skill.regeneration.desc: Powerful renewal; mends limbs and wounds.

skill.lethal_lunge.name: Lethal Lunge
skill.lethal_lunge.desc: The deadliest leap; heavy piercing damage.
skill.rend.name: Rend

skill.maul.name: Maul
skill.maul.desc: A savage physical assault; crushes and tears.

fusion.effect.tainted_strike.desc: Claw meets venom: each blow leaves a lingering, creeping toxin.
fusion.effect.snare_strike.desc: Silk tangles the target a heartbeat before the blow lands.
fusion.effect.rend.desc: Edge and point together tear deep, jagged wounds.
fusion.effect.flame_storm.desc: Wind fans the flame into a roaring, spreading firestorm.
fusion.effect.steam.desc: Water meets fire and erupts into scalding, blinding steam.
fusion.effect.thermal_shock.desc: Fire and frost collide — unstable, recoiling heat that bites the caster too.
fusion.effect.conductive_shock.desc: Lightning races through soaked targets, striking far harder.
fusion.effect.mud.desc: Earth and water churn into clinging, slowing mud.
fusion.effect.reinforce.desc: Two of a kind, fused and concentrated — simply stronger.
fusion.effect.precise_strike.desc: A sharpened mind guides the claw to the exact weak point.
fusion.effect.toxic_blood.desc: Your own venom turns regeneration into a creeping poison reserve.
fusion.effect.mix.desc: Two unlike powers forced together — an unstable hybrid strike.

log.ev_locked: That option is closed to you.
ev.fork.text: The tunnel splits in two. One carries a cool breeze, the other a dead silence.
ev.fork.left_ok: The left path was safe — you gathered some EP.
ev.fork.left_bad: A hidden spike on the left path cut you.
ev.fork.right_ok: An old trail on the right: a lore fragment.
ev.trap.text: A thin wire glints on the floor — a trap mechanism.
ev.trap.disarm_ok: You solved the mechanism and took the core within.
ev.trap.force_hurt: The trap sprang — you took a deep wound.
ev.carcass.text: The carcass of a creature that came before you. Something may be on it.
ev.carcass.loot_food: Still a fresh piece — into the larder.
ev.carcass.loot_map: A map fragment beneath the corpse.
ev.carcass.loot_poison: The carcass was rotten — poison seeped in.
ev.carcass.leave_r: You left the carcass as it was.
ev.altar.text: An altar covered in strange runes. It whispers to whoever pays its price.
ev.altar.offer_stat: The altar accepted — your wisdom grew.
ev.altar.offer_fail: The altar stayed silent; your EP was wasted.
ev.egg.text: In a damp corner, a strange egg pulses like a heartbeat.
ev.egg.crack_food: It was full of a nourishing pulp.
ev.egg.incubate_ok: Your patience paid off — some EP.
ev.egg.leave_r: You did not touch the egg.
ev.passage.text: Air moves through the wall — there may be a hidden passage.
ev.passage.perceive_ok: You sensed the hidden passage — valuable lore fragments.
ev.oldweb.text: An old web abandoned by another spider. Something is still caught in it.
ev.oldweb.loot_food: Fresh prey left in the web — to the larder.
ev.oldweb.loot_bad: The web was still venomous; it got on your hand.
ev.oldweb.absorb_ok: You wove the silk into your own — some EP.
ev.cocoon.text: An old cocoon, tightly wound in web. Something is inside.
ev.cocoon.open_spawn: The cocoon was a trap — a creature emerged!
ev.cocoon.peer_ok: You opened it safely — nourishing prey.
ev.wounded.text: A dying creature looks at you, pleading in its eyes.
ev.wounded.devour_food: You ate your prey; your hunger eased.
ev.wounded.devour_sin: Preying on the weak fed the dark axis.
ev.wounded.spare_virtue: Your mercy fed the light axis.
ev.wounded.ignore_r: You left the creature to its fate.
ev.hatchling.text: A hungry hatchling rubs against your legs.
ev.hatchling.feed_h: You shared your food — your hunger rose.
ev.hatchling.eat_food: You ate the hatchling — a small meal.
ev.hatchling.eat_sin: Eating the defenseless fed the dark axis.
ev.reincarnate.text: A weak creature, reincarnated like you. It watches you.
ev.reincarnate.ally_ok: You shared knowledge — a lore fragment.
ev.reincarnate.eat_ep: You devoured it — drank its strength (EP).
ev.reincarnate.eat_sin: Eating a kindred is a heavy sin.
ev.elementfont.text: A font vibrating with the layer's element. Dangerous, yet tempting.
ev.elementfont.touch_ok: You absorbed the energy — some EP.
ev.elementfont.touch_burn: The font burned you — a lasting mark.
ev.elementfont.draw_ok: Your body endured — your vitality grew.
ev.elementfont.flee_r: You backed away from the font.
ev.journal.text: A bloodstained journal, half-finished, atop a corpse.
ev.journal.read_ok: The pages whispered a clue — lore fragments.
ev.journal.eat_ep: You swallowed the words — a little EP.
ev.journal.keep_r: You took the journal with you.
ev.lorestone.text: A half-burned lore stone with faded runes.
ev.lorestone.solve_ok: You cracked the cipher — a lasting insight.
ev.lorestone.memorize_ok: You committed the runes to memory — a lore fragment.
ev.lorestone.break_ok: You broke the stone — its essence scattered (EP).
ev.watcher.text: An eye opens in the wall, watching you.
ev.watcher.stare_ok: You held its gaze — your mind sharpened.
ev.watcher.stare_dread: The eye pierced you — dread set in.
ev.watcher.blind_hurt: Your strike rebounded — you were wounded.
ev.watcher.blind_ep: You snuffed out the eye — some EP.
ev.rift.text: A rift trembling in reality. A strange pull comes from within.
ev.rift.gaze_ok: The rift showed you knowledge — lore fragments.
ev.rift.gaze_mad: What you saw strained your mind — dread.
ev.rift.reach_skill: You snatched a technique from the rift!
ev.rift.reach_scar: The rift tore your body — a lasting scar.
ev.rift.away_r: You backed away from the rift.
ev.sovereign.text: The remains of a powerful being. They still carry a weight.
ev.sovereign.respect_ok: Your respect fed the light axis.
ev.sovereign.steal_ep: You drained power from the remains (EP).
ev.sovereign.steal_sin: Robbing a grave fed the dark axis.
ev.sovereign.study_ok: You decoded the remains — a lasting knowledge.
ev.skitter.text: A skittering echo in the dark. Something is near.
ev.skitter.follow_ok: You tracked the sound — a map fragment.
ev.skitter.flee_r: You moved away from the sound.
ev.reflection.text: A still pool. You see yourself on its surface.
ev.reflection.look_ok: You found an insight in your reflection — EP.
ev.reflection.look_dread: Your reflection was a stranger — dread set in.
ev.reflection.drink_poison: The water was poisoned — it seeped in.
ev.larder.text: An abandoned larder — a plentiful but suspect heap of food.
ev.larder.eatall_rot: Some of it was rotten — you were poisoned.
ev.larder.pick_ok: You picked the freshest — into the larder.
ev.larder.leave_r: You left the larder as it was.
ev.moral_wounded.text: A wounded creature cowers in the corner, trembling as it watches you. It cannot flee.
ev.moral_wounded.spare_r: You let it go. A lightness within… (virtue)
ev.moral_wounded.devour: Devour it — such is the fate of the weak
ev.moral_wounded.devour_r: You consumed the helpless thing. Sin seeps into your soul.
ev.moral_surrender.text: A foe drops its weapon and kneels before you — it surrenders.
ev.moral_surrender.spare_r: You pardoned the one who yielded. (virtue)
ev.moral_surrender.devour_r: You slew the one who surrendered. Sin gathers.
ev.moral_brood.text: A defenseless nest: tiny young squirm within. Their mother is nowhere in sight.
ev.moral_brood.spare: Spare them — let the innocent live
ev.moral_brood.spare_r: You left the nest unharmed. (great virtue)
ev.moral_brood.devour_r: You ravaged the nest. A heavy sin.
br.cave.text: I am not what your eye sees, but what is born in my absence. Light drives me away, yet I always return; deepest down, I have been here since the beginning. What is my name?
br.cave.clue: The only thing left at the bottom of the cave when the light dies.
br.flame.text: Fire gives me birth, but when I am born the fire dies. I am the last form of what burned, the grave of heat. What is my name?
br.flame.clue: Every flame returns to this in the end.
br.bone.text: Flesh leaves, bone remains; but I am in neither — I live in word and silence. Forget me, and the dead die a second time. What is my name?
br.bone.clue: What those before you left behind; what lore carries.
ui.br_choose: You bested the boss with wit. What now?
ui.riddle_locked: Too many wrong tries — retry in {min} min.
log.br_solved: You solved the riddle! Skip or fight — your choice.
log.br_wrong: Wrong answer! A guard appeared. ({left} tries left)
log.br_fail_boss: Your last try is gone — an enraged boss faces you!
log.br_skip: You passed the boss with your wit.
log.br_fight: The boss appears at your chosen difficulty!
log.riddle_locked: The room is locked — wait a while.

stat.STR.desc: Muscle in your legs, pressure in your fangs — the raw force that crushes prey. The higher it climbs, the deeper every physical blow bites.
stat.VIT.desc: The toughness of your flesh and the length of your breath. It widens the gap between you and death, and lets you fight longer before you tire.
stat.AGI.desc: Reflex faster than instinct — a body that slips into shadow before the blow lands. You evade more often and ready your skills sooner.
stat.INT.desc: The sharpness of your small mind. It shapes your mana and unlocks the deep layers of hidden books — in this world, knowledge is survival itself.
stat.WIS.desc: The quiet voice of intuition — insight that finds the right corner in the dark and stillness in calm. It deepens your exploration rewards and meditation.
stat.LUCK.desc: Fate winking at you. You catch the scent of secret rooms, draw rare loot, and sense an ambush at the last moment.

book.book_1.title: Sacrifice Journal I
book.book_1.lore: «…lying on the ground I felt death breathing on my neck. My body began to close itself — independently, as if it had its own mind. I wondered: the closer I went, the faster it learned?»
book.book_1.deep: Deep layer: regeneration accelerates when HP drops below half. Learn to keep your body in the danger zone — wounds teach, comfort numbs.
book.book_2.title: Sacrifice Journal II
book.book_2.lore: «I began seeking pain. Each half-death, each razor-thin survival changed me. Then I understood: it's not surviving that strengthens — it's crossing the threshold and coming back.»
book.book_2.deep: Deep layer: surviving the edge of death leaves a permanent mark. Let it accumulate — your body eventually pushes its limits back. If you have a survival chance, approaching the brink is a training method.
book.book_3.title: Sacrifice Journal III
book.book_3.lore: «I waited motionless for days. Hunger passed, fear passed, thought itself passed. What remained was a strange clarity — and beneath it, something filling without my notice.»
book.book_3.deep: Deep layer: choosing the Meditate action fills an invisible light. You cannot know when it spills over — but it fills with patience. The light path demands depth, not speed.
book.book_4.title: Sacrifice Journal IV
book.book_4.lore: «I combined two powers. I expected an explosion — but a third thing emerged. Neither this nor that; entirely else. And when it collapsed, the scar it left was more permanent than what was born.»
book.book_4.deep: Deep layer: with the Fusion Lab open, any pairing can be attempted. Incompatible combos leave scars — four bad fusions tear you apart. Learn the compatible ones first, then experiment.
book.book_5.title: Sacrifice Journal V
book.book_5.lore: «I touched the forbidden. I could have pulled back — I didn't. Now I see everything I wanted to see. But also what I didn't.»
book.book_5.deep: Deep layer: when Taboo opens, both the Sin/Virtue axis and the Ruler ranking become active. Feed both to grow your authority. A door opened once does not close.
book.book_6.title: Sacrifice Journal VI
book.book_6.lore: «Thousands came here before me. All reached the same gate, all faced the same question. The wall says: be born, die, forget. I say: forget — but roots remain.»
book.book_6.deep: Deep layer: every creature that defeats the Gatekeeper begins the next life with a Tier increase. Levels reset; discoveries, capabilities, and limit expansions persist. Rebirth is not an end, not a reset — it's an ascent.
book.book_7.title: A Hunter's Tally
book.book_7.lore: «Everything alive has a weakness. I pressed fire to ice, lightning to water. Half of victory was knowing what to press where; the other half — was asking before pressing.»
book.book_7.deep: Deep layer: Fire → Ice, Ice → Acid, Poison → Flesh, Lightning → Water — and each reverse holds too. The wrong element dulls damage; the right one collapses it. Learn the enemy's type, then strike.
book.book_8.title: Chalk Scrawls
book.book_8.lore: «I drew eyes on the wall. Then I realized: the dark doesn't see, but place the right eye in the right spot — and seeing becomes a weapon. Was it watching me, or was I being watched, I no longer know.»
book.book_8.deep: Deep layer: different abilities can be slotted into each eye socket. Active mode attacks, passive mode watches and buffers. Want to merge two eyes: Eye Fusion. Even a blinded eye is useful — just place it right.
book.book_9.title: A Scholar's Marginalia
book.book_9.lore: «A beast I didn't know killed me twice. On the third I looked first: what type was it, what was it resistant to, where was it weak. The fourth time I didn't need to look — I knew it.»
book.book_9.deep: Deep layer: as Appraisal levels up it reveals the enemy's type, attack value, HP and weakness. At level 5 the weakness type becomes visible. Knowledge = survival — that's not a slogan, it's a formula.
book.book_10.title: The Fallen Queen's Seal
book.book_10.lore: «Once I was a tiny spider. Now I'm not sure what I am — each evolution step left something behind. Did I gain power, or give up myself?»
book.book_10.deep: Deep layer: evolution branches — there is no going back. See all branches before choosing a form. The strongest form is not always the right one; plan the path, not just the power. Know the branching tree well.

tut.step1.title: Welcome, Adventurer!
tut.step1.body: In this world, Knowledge = Power. You start as a weak creature — but through combat, skills, and evolution you will become unstoppable. This tutorial will guide you through the basics.
tut.step2.title: Your Status Bars
tut.step2.body: At the top you can see three bars: HP (health — if it hits 0 you die), MP (mana — used by skills), and SP (stamina — used by special abilities). Hunger also appears here — keep it in check!
tut.step3.title: Combat
tut.step3.body: On the Hunt stage you attack enemies. Use Auto mode to fight automatically, or Manual mode to trigger skills yourself. Defeating enemies earns XP and skill experience.
tut.step4.title: Skills
tut.step4.body: Every skill gains experience as you use it. At level 10, a skill can evolve into a more powerful form. Track your skills and their progress in Body → Skills.
tut.step5.title: Map & Rooms
tut.step5.body: The dungeon is structured as Layer.Floor.Room. Clear rooms to advance, reach the boss to unlock the next floor. Switch to the Map view (strip above the stage) to navigate floors you've already cleared.
tut.step6.title: Hunger
tut.step6.body: Hunger rises over time. If you get too hungry, your stats will drop. Use the Forage button to find food, or keep defeated enemies in your larder to eat later.
tut.step7.title: Stat Points
tut.step7.body: Each time you level up, you earn Stat Points. Spend them in the Soul area to strengthen STR (attack), VIT (HP), AGI (speed/dodge), INT (MP/skills), WIS (mana regen), or LUCK.
tut.step8.title: Evolution
tut.step8.body: When you meet the requirements, your race can evolve into a new form. Each form has different bonuses and unlocks new evolution branches. Check the evolution tree in the Soul area!
hint.skill_levelup.title: Skill Level Up!
hint.skill_levelup.body: One of your skills gained a level. At level 10 it can evolve into a more powerful form.
hint.evo_available.title: Evolution Available!
hint.evo_available.body: Your race can now evolve. Open the Soul area to see the evolution tree.
hint.stat_point.title: Stat Point Earned!
hint.stat_point.body: You earned a Stat Point. Spend it in the Soul area to strengthen your character.
hint.fusion_unlock.title: Fusion Unlocked!

guide.title: Guide
guide.basics.title: Basic Status Bars
guide.basics.body: HP (green bar): your health. If it reaches 0, you die and restart. MP (blue bar): mana, spent when you use skills. SP (gold bar): stamina, used by special abilities. Hunger (brown bar): rises over time — high hunger lowers your stats.
guide.combat.title: Combat System
guide.combat.body: You fight enemies on the Hunt stage. Auto mode attacks automatically each second. Manual mode lets you choose when to use each skill. Defeating enemies earns XP (levels you up) and skill EXP (levels up individual skills). Your Attack Cooldown (shown in combat) determines how fast you strike.
guide.skills.title: Skills & Evolution
guide.skills.body: Each skill gains EXP when used in combat. At level 10, a skill may evolve into an upgraded form with new effects. Some evolutions branch — choose carefully. The Skill Tree shows chains and unlock conditions. Equip skills from your loadout to use them in combat (up to your skill slot limit).
guide.map.title: Map & Rooms
guide.map.body: The dungeon is structured as Layer → Floor → Room (shown as L.F.R at the top). Clear all rooms on a floor, then defeat the boss to advance to the next floor. Switch to the Map view (strip above the stage) to revisit already-cleared floors for farming. Each layer has a tier requirement.
guide.hunger.title: Hunger & Forage
guide.hunger.body: Hunger rises as time passes during combat or rest. When hunger passes 70%, your stats start to drop. Use the Forage button (on the Hunt stage) to search for food. You can also store enemy corpses in your larder and eat them later. Auto-Eat will eat automatically when hunger gets high.
guide.stats.title: Stats & Stat Points
guide.stats.body: You have 6 core stats: STR (physical attack power), VIT (max HP), AGI (attack speed and dodge chance), INT (max MP and skill effectiveness), WIS (MP regen rate), LUCK (loot and crit chance). Every level up grants Stat Points. Spend them wisely — Respec costs EP.
guide.inventory.title: Inventory & Equipment
guide.inventory.body: Available for humanoid races. Items you find go to your inventory. You can equip them to gain stat bonuses. Use Forge to upgrade rarity (costs EP). Scrap Common items to recover EP. Auto-Equip automatically equips the best items for your build.
guide.soul.title: Soul Tree & Meditation
guide.soul.body: After gaining Souls (from kills with high Sin), you can spend them in the Soul Tree for permanent upgrades that persist through rebirth. Meditation increases your Virtue stat over time and unlocks Light-aligned ruler powers. Both are found in the Soul area.
guide.fusion.title: Skill Fusion
guide.fusion.body: Once Fusion is unlocked, you can combine two skills to create a new hybrid skill. Select two skills in Body → Skills and press Fuse. The result is determined by the combination — experiment to discover new skills! Fusion results are shared globally (same combo = same result for everyone).
guide.human_path.title: Human Path
guide.human_path.body: If your race is Human (or reaches a humanoid evolution), a specialization choice called the Human Path becomes available. This is a one-time decision that shapes your character's direction. Choose wisely — it cannot be undone without rebirth.
guide.lore.title: Bestiary & Lore
guide.lore.body: The Bestiary records every enemy you've encountered, showing their stats and weaknesses after you've fought them enough times. Mind → Lore contains books you've found in the dungeon — reading them grants EP and INT bonuses. The Lore log on the bottom right preserves all book entries.
guide.races.title: Races
guide.races.body: Your race determines your starting skills, stats, and evolution tree. You can change your race until your first kill. Each race has unique strengths and growth paths — see the cards below.

bestiary.flavor.elroe_frog: The simplest creature of the lower layers. Easy prey for newly awakened spiders.
bestiary.flavor.elroe_geafrog: Moves slowly but its body is poisonous. Useful for training poison resistance.
bestiary.flavor.small_lesser_taratect: Small but agile spider. The most common predator in the dungeon's early layers.
bestiary.flavor.small_poison_taratect: Uses sticky silk to paralyze prey. Helpful for building up poison resistance.
bestiary.flavor.elroe_basilisk: A hard-shelled creature. Resistant to physical damage; beware its petrifying gaze.
bestiary.flavor.elroe_pebbluck: The most defensive creature in the dungeon thanks to its thick shell. Crushing blows may work.
bestiary.flavor.lesser_taratect: A mature spider that has gained regeneration from silk weaving. Prepare for long fights.
bestiary.flavor.elroe_gunerush: Lives in the hot lava of the middle layers. Deals fire damage; helps you sense flame magic.
bestiary.flavor.elroe_gunerave: A cunning fire snake that attacks with double strikes. Do not underestimate its speed.
bestiary.flavor.elroe_gunesohka: Deals wide area damage with powerful flame breath. Approaching without fire resistance is suicide.
bestiary.flavor.elroe_guneseven: The strongest of the fire snakes. Its crimson flames reduce everything to ash.
bestiary.flavor.magma_newt: A small salamander living in lava. Deals fire damage; helps you sense flame magic.
bestiary.flavor.elroe_cohgou: A brawler that relies on physical strength. Known for its powerful punch attacks.
bestiary.flavor.flame_jaw: The ruler of the middle layers. Made of pure flame, it deals heavy damage. Guards the passage as a sub-boss.
bestiary.flavor.finjicote: Piercing attacks that break through even armor. No matter how high your defense, stay alert.
bestiary.flavor.greater_taratect: The most dangerous spider in the dungeon. A lethal hunter armed with necrotoxin and cutting wires.
bestiary.flavor.shade_wraith: A ghost dealing spiritual damage. Physical attacks are ineffective; use magic or soul power.
bestiary.flavor.venom_brute: A venomous and powerful creature. It both poisons and crushes.
bestiary.flavor.abyss_stalker: A spider lurking in the deepest abyss, freezing its victims with a stone gaze.
bestiary.flavor.cave_horror: A fear creature that feeds on darkness. Deals fear damage and is deeply demoralizing.
bestiary.flavor.earth_dragon_araba: A massive earth dragon. Known for earth-shaking attacks and immense physical resilience.
bestiary.flavor.earth_dragon_kaguna: A senior earth dragon. Avoiding its devastating blows is nearly impossible.
bestiary.flavor.earth_dragon_rendill: An earth dragon with fire breath. Deals both physical and fire damage — the most dangerous dragon type.
bestiary.flavor.queen_taratect: The spider queen. Weaves magical webs and launches spatial attacks. The strongest spider in the dungeon.
bestiary.flavor.abyss_horror: A terror from the dark depths of the abyss. Fights with soul damage.
bestiary.flavor.system_guardian: The ultimate guardian of the dungeon. Keeps the Rebirth gate locked with immense power. Complete all preparations before engaging.
